Name: AccountParam
Description: Determines the HUD display parameters above an enemy when targeted in-game.

Fields.Name: Name Text ID
Fields.Description:
Base FMG Entry ID.
+0 FE Aircraft Name
+1 FE Pilot Name
+2 Menu Aircraft Name
+3 Menu Pilot Name / Conversation Speaker Name
+4 Aircraft Name / Pilot Name

Fields.Name: Emblem Decal ID
Fields.Description: ID of the Menu Decal to use, refers to SB_DecalThumbnails.layout
